content.text:
<session_context>
This is the Gemini CLI. We are setting up the context for our chat.
Today's date is Friday, June 12, 2026 (formatted according to the user's locale).
My operating system is: darwin
The project's temporary directory is: /Users/ingo/.gemini/tmp/cwd-47
- **Workspace Directories:**
  - /Users/ingo/projects/irrlicht/.claude/worktrees/gemini-cli-onboard/.build/refresh/gemini-cli/3-3_background-process-20260612T113708/cwd
- **Directory Structure:**

Showing up to 200 items (files + folders).

/Users/ingo/projects/irrlicht/.claude/worktrees/gemini-cli-onboard/.build/refresh/gemini-cli/3-3_background-process-20260612T113708/cwd/
└───.gemini/
    └───settings.json


</session_context>

Do exactly this and nothing else, in a single turn. Use the run_shell_command tool to run the command `sleep 40 && echo BG_DONE`, and set its is_background parameter to true so it launches in the background and the tool returns immediately with a background PID. As soon as that tool returns the background PID, reply with exactly the word: done. Do NOT poll, do NOT check whether it finished, do NOT run any other commands — the background process must still be running when you reply.

thoughts.subject: Focusing on Execution
thoughts.description: I'm zeroing in on the user's specific request: a singular, immediate background task. The core challenge is isolating and flawlessly executing this action, without any unintended side effects or elaborations. The key seems to be a meticulous implementation.

thoughts.subject: Refining Task Execution
thoughts.description: I've decided to refine the task execution. My current plan is to call a specific command tool to run `sleep 40 && echo BG_DONE` in the background. The tool must return immediately with a background PID. The system's response needs to be just "done" after the PID is received. I'm avoiding `update_topic` since this single command task is simple and falls under the exception.

args.description: Launches a background process that sleeps for 40 seconds and then echoes BG_DONE
